title: RetroRig: Quarry
description: Brings the retro BuildCraft quarry into modern Minecraft, using FE energy, frames, construction torches.
body:
Brings back the classic BuildCraft quarry for modern Minecraft.
_(part of the RetroRig mod suite bringing back BuildCraft elements)_

Place a Quarry block and it gets to work, automatically constructing a frame around the dig area, then mining everything inside down to bedrock. Drops are ejected above the machine or routed into connected inventories.

Construction Torches let you define a custom dig area. Place two torches at the same Y level within 64 blocks of each other and the quarry will respect those bounds.

Powered by Forge Energy. Compatible with other tech mods.

**Features:**

- Automatic frame construction and interior clearing
- Custom dig area via Construction Torches
- Block break sounds and a looping ambient operating sound
- Ejects items above the machine or into adjacent inventories
- Crafting: The quarry takes iron blocks, diamonds, a diamond pickaxe, repeaters, and a copper trapdoor.
  
**Recipe**

![Quarry Crafting](https://i.ibb.co/VpPCQWhx/crafting-quarry.png)

Get Involved Suggestions, bug reports, and feedback happen over on the Discord: https://discord.gg/RJqPMHbUh3
